mnemonics: CCF: Concurrent, Collaborative, Flexible (describes the nature of concurrent models)
keyPoints: Concurrent models allow multiple software development activities to occur simultaneously.
They emphasize frequent communication and collaboration between different teams.
They are highly flexible and adaptable to changing requirements.
commonMistakes: Assuming concurrent activities are independent and don't require constant communication.
Poorly managing the integration of components developed in parallel, leading to conflicts.
